wudang.name: Wudang Sect
wudang.description: Taoist sword and internal arts on mist-wrapped peaks. Disciples meditate before they strike.

shaolin.name: Shaolin Temple
shaolin.tagline: The body is the first scripture.
shaolin.description: Monks temper flesh and will. External strength and iron discipline define the path.

mount_hua.name: Mount Hua Sect
mount_hua.tagline: One sword, one breath, one peak.
mount_hua.description: Austere sword cultivators who value precision, honor, and the long climb.

kunlun.name: Kunlun Sect
kunlun.tagline: Between righteousness and demonic fire, the peak stays neutral.
kunlun.description: Ancient mystics who accept only cultivators walking the middle path.

tang.name: Tang Sect
tang.description: Artificers of poison and concealed steel. Reputation matters less than results.

blood_lotus.name: Blood Lotus Cult
blood_lotus.tagline: Power drawn from sacrifice and hunger.
blood_lotus.description: A demonic order that trades mercy for strength. Only the ruthless are welcome.

imperial_guard.name: Imperial Guard
imperial_guard.tagline: Serve the throne. Guard the realm.
imperial_guard.description: The emperor's hidden cultivators. Recruitment is by edict alone — no wanderer may petition entry.

shadow_pavilion.name: Shadow Pavilion
shadow_pavilion.tagline: What the light rejects, we refine.
shadow_pavilion.description: A demonic society that recruits only those who prove themselves in ruin and blood.
